summary: W1412 adds a checked closed-map normalized-source-triangulation stable convergence guard tying W970 through W969 into the closed-map route chain. The original four-task product goal remains open.
known_gaps: ProductSuccessDeclarations only checks the bounded-derived name without an original-four-task completion witness.
OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations lacks the original-four-task completion witness.
Required negative fixtures remain incomplete for several premature-success patterns.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
remaining_work: Advance the remaining Lean route blockers after W1412, including downstream W971+ field splits, packet blockers, and any completion-contract blockers still recorded by the audits.
